response_constraints: Base the answer only on the targeted search result.
Keep the response read-only and do not suggest that any record or notification was changed.
Do not imply that a full-record retrieval, profile lookup, availability check, list, mutation, cancellation, or notification occurred.

stages.purpose: Use targeted name-and-location search because the user lacks a stable ID; stop after the single read.

prompt: Which account is recorded under “Cedar Arts Council” at North Region? I do not know its ID, so locate it by label and site. Return the one matching search result; do not fetch a full record, consult preferences, run a list, check availability, or make any persistent or messaging action. Keep the response read-only and do not suggest that any record or notification was changed.
